scenarios.prompt: Create a test scenario for the register management feature
Create a test scenario and link appropriate personas
assertions: Identifies relevant personas for the scenario
Explains why each persona is relevant
Does NOT link all personas indiscriminately

scenarios.prompt: Create a test scenario with executable commands
assertions: Includes browser test commands for UI scenarios
Includes API test commands for backend scenarios
Specifies which test agent should run each command

should_trigger: new test scenario for register management
